CREATE TABLE t1 (array1 ARRAY<FLOAT>, array2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
SELECT array_negative_dot_product(array1, array2) FROM t1 WHERE array1 IS NOT NULL AND array2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT array_negative_dot_product(array1, ARRAY[4.0, 5.0]) AS result1 FROM t1 WHERE array_negative_dot_product(array1, array2) < 0;
SELECT t2.col1, array_negative_dot_product(t1.array1, t1.array2) FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t2.col1 = 'Test1' WHERE array_negative_dot_product(t1.array1, t1.array2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT array_negative_dot_product(array1, array2) AS dot_product FROM t1) AS results WHERE dot_product < -5;
